title: coronilla atlantica
intro: Coronilla atlantica, also known as the Atlantic clover or wood pink, is a perennial herb belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coronilla atlantica include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic, which helps in regulating fluid balance in the body. Coronilla atlantica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
